django-tests.description: Runs the Django test suite (python manage.py test) when the agent goes idle.

django-check.description: Runs Django's system check framework (python manage.py check) when the agent goes idle.

django-check-deploy.description: Runs Django's deployment-readiness checks (python manage.py check --deploy) when the agent goes idle. Catches DEBUG=True, missing ALLOWED_HOSTS, insecure secret key, etc.

django-makemigrations-check.description: Fails if model changes are not reflected in a migration (python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run) when the agent goes idle. Catches un-migrated model drift before commit; writes nothing.
